title: S.O. 431(E) Nomination of Members and re-constitution of CPCB
description: S.O. 431(E) Nomination of Members and re-constitution of CPCB
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 307 ] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, MAY 3,2000/VAISAKHA 13,1922 (l) 1263 GI/2000 -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(II)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd May, 2000 S.O. 431(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), the Central Government hereby re-constitutes the Central Pollution Control Board and nominates the following persons as its Members with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely :— 1 Shri D.K. Biswas, Chairman Chairman Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi. Members nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 3 : 2. Shri Naresh Narad, Member Additional Secretary, Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, New Delhi. 3. Dr. S.C. Maudgal, Member Adviser, Ministry of Environment and Forests, New Delhi 4. Shri J.S. Maini, Member Joint Secretary and Financial Adviser, Ministry of Environment and Forests, New Delhi. 5. Smt. Aruna Bagchee, Member Joint Secretary, Department of Mines, New Delhi. 6. Shri S. Banerjee, Member Joint Secretary, Ministry of Urban Affairs and Employment, New Delhi. Members nominated under clause (c) of sub-section (2) of section 3 : 7. Shri C.P. Mishra, Member Mukhya Nagar Adhikari, Lucknow Municipal Corporation, Lucknow (U P.) 8. Prof. M.C. Das, Member Chairman, Orissa State Pollution Control Board, Bhubaneswar. -- 2 of 4 -- 3 '). Prof. B. Shivalingaiah. Member Chairman, Karnataka State Pollution Control Board, Bangalore. 10. Shri S. Ghosh, Member Mayor, Howrali Municipal Corporation, Howrah, West Bengal. 11 Shri Paul Thachil, Member Chairman, Kerala State Pollution Control Board. Thiruvananthapuram. Members nominated under clause (d) of sub-section (2) of section 3 : 12. Dr. G. Soodamani, Member Mayor, Salem Corporation, Salem, Tamil Nadu. 13. Shri Manoj Kumar Santhalia, Member Chairman-cum-Managing Director, Express Publications (Madurai) Limited, Express Estate, Chennai-600 002. 14. Shri A. Sivasailam. Member Chairman-cum-Managing Director, M/s Tractor Farm Equipment Limited, 35, Nungambakkam High Road, Chennai-600 034. Members nominated under clause (e) of sub-section (2) of section 3 : 15. Shri Ram Mohan. S. Member Chairman-cum-Managing Director, Madras Refineries Limited, 552, Anna Salai, Chennai-600 018. 16. Shri V. Suresh, Member Chairman, HUDCO, New Delhi. Member Secretary appointed under clause (0 of sub-section (2) of section 3 : 17 Dr. B. Sengupta, Member Secretary Member Secretary, Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi. [No. Q-15014(1)/90-CPW (Vol. II)] VIJAI SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Note : — 1 . The Principal notification constituting the Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 998(E), dated 21-9-1974 and subsequently reconstituted vide notification numbers S.O. 814(E), dated 2nd December, 1991 and S.O. 75 (E), dated 1st February, 1995. 2. Dr. B. Sengupta has been appointed as Member Secretary, Central Pollution Control Board by this Ministry for a period of 3 years w.e.f. 12-10-1998 (AN). Printed by the Manager,Govt of India Press, Ring Road. Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-110054 -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
